description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a rectangular main structure and an attached single-story garage. The house features a hip roof with dark shingles and a light-colored brick or stone facade. The front elevation is symmetrical, with large vertical windows and a central double-door entryway, flanked by low hedges and a paved walkway. The property is landscaped with several stylized trees and a small garden bed along the front. The garage is set to one side, with a matching hip roof and a driveway leading up to it. The overall design is clean and orderly, with a focus on balanced proportions and functional outdoor space.
description: A two-story house with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, attached garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, attached garage to the right, and landscaped yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the hip roofs of both the main house and garage, as well as the layout of the driveway and surrounding trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows and the absence of the main entryway, with trees visible on either side.
description_view_3: Side view showing the garage in the foreground, the main house behind, and the driveway leading up to the entryway, with trees on the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with steps, flanked by low hedges and a paved walkway, no porch or columns.
